about:
I'm Joshua Vicente, a Full Stack Developer based in the Philippines. I started in design and front-end development, but I became increasingly interested in what happens behind the interface—how data moves, how business workflows are structured, and how different parts of a system work together.

Today, I build full-stack applications using Django, Django REST Framework, Nuxt.js, Vue.js, and PostgreSQL. I've worked with local and international clients on e-commerce platforms, event systems, administrative tools, and custom business applications.

Outside development, I previously taught Information Technology and currently help lead TECHSAVVY Community in Misamis Occidental. I've also been invited to speak at technology and educational events.

I like building software people actually use.

experience.summary: Building production-grade systems and business solutions.
highlights: Designed and implemented multiple Django & Nuxt web systems.
Integrated payment solutions such as Stripe and PayMongo for international markets.
Managed database schema migrations and production hosting configurations.

experience.summary: Leading community efforts, workshops, and tech meetups.
highlights: Organized community events to foster developer talent in the region.
Curated speaker lineups and educational workshops for local tech graduates.
Collaborated with educational institutions to align syllabus with industry standards.

experience.summary: Instructed college-level courses in software engineering and database systems.
highlights: Delivered lecture series on Web Development, Databases (SQL), and OOP principles.
Mentored student capstone groups leading to regional research publication.
Created an online grading and assignment system utilized by the department.

experience.summary: Developed components and APIs for enterprise productivity dashboards.
highlights: Refactored legacy REST endpoints, improving query execution speed by 30%.
Collaborated with UI designers to implement dynamic charts using Chart.js.
Wrote comprehensive unit tests ensuring high code coverage.

speaking.description: Spoke about architecting software for real-world operations, emphasizing connection and structural patterns.

speaking.topic: Bridging Design and Backends in Nuxt.js
speaking.description: Shared insights on responsive systems, state synchronization, and reactive layouts.

speaking.topic: Modern E-Commerce Orchestration with Django & Vue
speaking.description: Addressed checkout flow state tracking and resilience during API failures.
